trust_report.cds_edition_used: 2025-2026 (latest available; 2027-2028 edition not yet posted as of July 2026 — CDS index at https://oir.yale.edu/common-data-set lists 2025-2026 as most recent)
trust_report.doctrine: null-over-guess; deterministic fields anchored to CDS/Scorecard with provenance; high-stakes fields blind-verified; arithmetic-gated; every source consulted is logged

overall_acceptance_rate.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)
overall_acceptance_rate.quote: C1: admitted (men 1189 + women 1198 = 2387) / applied (men 22819 + women 27445 = 50264) = 4.7%. 'Total first-time, first-year men who were admitted 1189 ... women who were admitted 1198'; 'men who applied 22819 ... women who applied 27445'

transfer_acceptance_rate.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)

applications_total.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)
applications_total.quote: C1: 'Total first-time, first-year men who applied 22819' + 'Total first-time, first-year women who applied 27445' = 50264 (no Other-gender row reported).

admits_total.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)
admits_total.quote: C1: 'Total first-time, first-year men who were admitted 1189' + 'Total first-time, first-year women who were admitted 1198' = 2387.

enrolled_total.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)
enrolled_total.quote: C1: 'Total first-time, first-year men who enrolled 799' + 'women who enrolled 834' = 1633; cross-checked by B2 'TOTAL 1633' first-time first-year.

yield_rate.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)

sat_composite_middle_50.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)

sat_reading_middle_50.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)

sat_math_middle_50.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)

act_composite_middle_50.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)

test_submission_rate.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)
test_submission_rate.quote: C9: 'Submitting SAT Scores 67% 1092' + 'Submitting ACT Scores 25% 412' = ~92% of the 1,633 enrolled submitting a national SAT/ACT score (sum assumes no SAT+ACT overlap; Yale is test-flexible so remainder submitted AP/IB).

race_white.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)

race_black.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)
race_black.quote: B2 first-year: 'Black or African American 137 ...' of 1633 = 8.4%.

race_hispanic.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)
race_hispanic.quote: B2 first-year: 'Hispanic or Latino of Any Race 222 ...' of 1633 = 13.6%.

race_asian.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)

race_native_american.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)
race_native_american.quote: B2 first-year: 'American Indian or Alaska Native 10 ...' of 1633 = 0.6%.

race_pacific_islander.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)
race_pacific_islander.quote: B2 first-year: 'Native Hawaiian or other Pacific Islander 4 ...' of 1633 = 0.2%.

race_two_or_more.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)
race_two_or_more.quote: B2 first-year: 'Two or more races 129 ...' of 1633 = 7.9%.

race_unknown.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)

race_international.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)

international_percentage.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)
international_percentage.quote: B2: first-year 'Nonresident Alien 155' of 1633 = 9.5% of the entering class (all-undergrad alternative: 706 of 6636 degree-seeking = 10.6%).

freshman_retention_rate.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)
freshman_retention_rate.quote: B22: 'Calculate the percentage of the Fall 2024 entering cohort who remained enrolled on the official census date. 99.4%' (cohort 1,554; still enrolled 1,545).

graduation_rate_4_year.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)
graduation_rate_4_year.quote: B4-B11 Fall 2019 cohort: 'D. ...completed the program in four years or less (by Aug. 31, 2023) ... 818' / 'C. Final 2019 cohort ... 1550' = 52.8% (COVID-depressed on-time rate; many delayed to 5 yrs — E total 606).

graduation_rate_6_year.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)
graduation_rate_6_year.quote: B4-B11: 'H. Six-year graduation rate for 2019 cohort (G divided by C) ... 0.963' (total column).

in_state_tuition.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)
in_state_tuition.quote: G1 (2026-2027 academic year), private institution flat tuition: 'PRIVATE INSTITUTION ... Tuition $72,500' (public in-state/out-of-state rows are blank/dashes — no residency distinction).

total_coa_in_state.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)
total_coa_in_state.quote: G1+G5 (2026-27, on-campus resident) derived sum: Tuition $72,500 + Food and Housing $21,600 + Books and supplies $1,000 + Transportation $1,100 + Other expenses $2,700 = $98,900 (G1 Required Fees cell left blank).

total_coa_out_of_state.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)
total_coa_out_of_state.quote: Same as in-state (private): Tuition $72,500 + Food/Housing $21,600 + Books $1,000 + Transportation $1,100 + Other $2,700 = $98,900.

median_earnings_10yr.source: U.S. Dept of Education College Scorecard (api.data.gov backend of the school profile page)
median_earnings_10yr.quote: College Scorecard API (id 130794 Yale University): '"latest.earnings.10_yrs_after_entry.median": 100533' — median earnings of former students 10 years after entry = $100,533.

is_test_optional.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)
is_test_optional.quote: C8F: 'Yale has a test-flexible policy which requires all first-year and transfer applicants to submit standardized test scores.' Not test-optional — scores are required (SAT/ACT/AP/IB flexible).

test_policy_details.value: Test-flexible: all applicants must submit standardized test scores, choosing from SAT, ACT, AP, or IB.
test_policy_details.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)
test_policy_details.quote: C8F: 'Yale has a test-flexible policy which requires all first-year and transfer applicants to submit standardized test scores. Applicants choose which scores to include from four options: ACT, Advanced Placement (AP), International Baccalaureate (IB), and ACT.' (verbatim; the four options are SAT/ACT/AP/IB — CDS text mistypes ACT twice). C8 table marks SAT or ACT 'Not required for admission, but considered if submitted.'

waitlist_offered.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)
waitlist_offered.quote: C2: 'Number of qualified applicants offered a place on waiting list 944'.

waitlist_accepted.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)
waitlist_accepted.quote: C2: 'Number accepting a place on the waiting list 738'.

waitlist_admitted.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)

waitlist_admit_rate.source: Yale University Common Data Set 2025-26 (Yale OIR)
waitlist_admit_rate.quote: C2 derived: admitted 32 / accepting a place on waitlist 738 = 4.3% (vs 32/944 offered = 3.4%).

notes: CDS located (2025-2026 (latest available; 2027-2028 edition not yet posted as of July 2026 — CDS index at https://oir.yale.edu/common-data-set lists 2025-2026 as most recent))
Direct URL to the latest available CDS (2025-2026), used as the CDS source since target 2027-2028 is not yet published.

Yale's official Common Data Set 2025-26 (Fall 2025 entering class). Source for all admissions/enrollment/test/GPA/race/retention/graduation/cost fields. NOTE: this is the 2025-26 CDS, not the requested 2027-28 — the 2027-28 CDS does not yet exist, so as_of_cycle recorded as 2025-2026.

official admissions page

Need-blind for all; 'award every dollar... on the basis of demonstrated financial need'; 'No Tuition — For families with incomes below $200,000'; '$75,220 Average annual need-based scholarship' (undated); '88% graduates with no student loan debt'; '80% US families qualify for grants covering at least tuition.'
Surfaced in search for deadlines; not fetched — aid deadlines taken from finaid.yale.edu/apply/prospective.

Platforms (Common App, Coalition on SCOIR, QuestBridge; one application per cycle), required components, test-required statement, optional supplementary materials (Visual Art/Dance/Music/Film/STEM research), and the three decision plans.

Aid form = 'need-based Yale Scholarship grants'; Yale was 'America's first private research university to establish need-blind admissions and need-based financial aid.' No stats on this page.

Avg scholarship 'Almost $73,000' in 2024-25; '55%' receive need-based aid; no-loan policy; $2,000 Start-Up Grant; hospitalization coverage; $100,000 zero-parent-share threshold; '100% of demonstrated need.'
Application requirements/deadlines: CSS Profile code 3987, FAFSA 001426; 2026-27 cycle deadlines (EA/QuestBridge Nov 1 2025, Intl EA Dec 1 2025, RD Feb 15 2026, Transfer Apr 1 2026).
Attempted direct fetch for first-year aid deadlines — returned HTTP 404. Deadlines obtained instead from finaid.yale.edu/apply/prospective.
Verbatim: 'No, Yale College does not offer merit nor athletic scholarships.' CSS Profile via IDOC; offers not reduced for late submission; aid regardless of citizenship.

Named aid types: Yale Scholarship (need only), entitlement grants (Pell/SEOG/state/Yale Club) reduce Yale Scholarship dollar-for-dollar, term-time jobs/Federal Work-Study; outside merit scholarships 'not offered by Yale' may reduce/replace Student Share; no loans in package.
Surfaced in search; not fetched — start-up grant detail obtained from the start-grant page snippet.

Via search snippet: Start-Up Grant/Supplemental Allowance = $2,000 for zero-parent-share first-years (parents under $75,000 with typical assets); covers winter clothing, dorm necessities, course supplies. Threshold differs from affordability page.
$270.5M/year need-based aid; average yearly scholarship $72,866; 'fifty-three percent of students receive need-based assistance'; $15K average debt at graduation. Figures dated 2025.
